heading: Destruction of existing stockpile of lethal chemical agents and munitions

children.heading: Program management
children.label: a Program management
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure that the program for destruction of the United States stockpile of lethal chemical agents and munitions is managed as a major defense acquisition program (as defined in ) in accordance with the essential elements of such programs as may be determined by the Secretary.section 4201 of title 10

children.heading: Requirement for Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller) annual certification
children.label: b Requirement for Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller) annual certification
children.text: Beginning with respect to the budget request for fiscal year 2004, the Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller) shall submit to the congressional defense committees on an annual basis a certification that the budget request for the chemical agents and munitions destruction program has been submitted in accordance with the requirements of .section 1521 of this title
